name_jp: 鮨 さいとう
description_zh: 米其林三星江户前寿司殿堂，主厨齐藤孝司亲握，醋饭温度与鱼料切刀皆为最高水准
address: 日本〒106-0032 Tokyo, Minato City, Roppongi, 1-chōme−4−５ 1F
description_en: Three-Michelin-star Edomae sushi temple; master Takashi Saito's rice temperature and knife work set the benchmark.

name_jp: 数寄屋橋 次郎
description_zh: 纪录片《寿司之神》原型，小野二郎家族经营，银座地下传奇店
address: 日本〒104-0061 Tokyo, Chuo City, Ginza, 4-chōme−2−１５ 塚本総業ビル B1階
description_en: The legendary basement counter from 'Jiro Dreams of Sushi', run by the Ono family in Ginza.

name_jp: 寿司大
description_zh: 丰洲市场内顶流，凌晨排队即名场面，主厨配套（おまかせ）性价比极高
address: 6-chōme-5-1 Toyosu, Koto City, Tokyo 135-0061日本
description_en: Toyosu Market's most famous sushi bar; the dawn queue is iconic and the omakase is superb value.

name_jp: 一蘭 渋谷店
description_zh: 天然豚骨汤底，单人格子座位，中文/英文订单表，初次到日本的安心之选
address: 日本〒150-0041 Tokyo, Shibuya, Jinnan, 1-chōme−22−７ 岩本ビル B1F
description_en: Natural tonkotsu broth in solo booths, with Chinese/English order sheets — a safe first stop in Japan.

name_jp: 一風堂 銀座店
description_zh: 白丸/赤丸经典豚骨，店内空间宽敞干净，适合家庭用餐
address: 日本〒104-0061 Tokyo, Chuo City, Ginza, 4-chōme−10−３ セントラルビル 1F
description_en: Classic Shiromaru and Akamaru tonkotsu in a spacious, clean dining room — great for families.

name_jp: Japanese Soba Noodles 蔦
description_zh: 世界首家米其林星级拉面店，黑松露酱油汤头是必点
address: 日本〒170-0002 Tokyo, Toshima City, Sugamo, 1-chōme−14−１ プラトー坂 1階
description_en: The world's first Michelin-starred ramen shop; the black-truffle shoyu broth is a must.

name_jp: てんぷら 近藤
description_zh: 米其林二星，蔬菜天妇罗大师近藤文夫的代表作，红薯天妇罗一绝
address: 日本〒104-0061 Tokyo, Chuo City, Ginza, 5-chōme−5−１３ Sakaguchi Bld., ９F
description_en: Two Michelin stars; vegetable-tempura master Fumio Kondo's signature sweet-potato tempura is legendary.

name_jp: つな八 新宿総本店
description_zh: 1924年创业的天妇罗百年老铺，午餐套餐性价比超高
address: 3-chōme-31-8 Shinjuku, Shinjuku City, Tokyo 160-0022日本
description_en: A tempura institution since 1924; the lunch sets are outstanding value.

name_jp: 鳥喜
description_zh: 目黑老牌烧鸟名店，备长炭炙烤，鸡肉刺身为隐藏菜单
address: 2-chōme-14-12 Kamiōsaki, Shinagawa City, Tokyo 141-0021日本
description_en: A veteran Meguro yakitori shop grilled over binchotan charcoal; chicken sashimi is the hidden menu.

name_jp: 鳥貴族 新宿東口店
name_zh: 鸟贵族 新宿东口店
description_zh: 全品 360 円均一价烧鸟连锁，年轻人居酒屋首选，热闹氛围
address: Peace Bldg., ８階, 3-chōme-34-11 Shinjuku, Shinjuku City, Tokyo 160-0022日本
description_en: A flat-price (¥360) yakitori chain — a lively izakaya favorite among young locals.

name_jp: まい泉 青山本店
description_zh: 改建自浴场的炸猪排名店，肉质柔软到可用筷子切开
address: 4-chōme-8-5 Jingūmae, Shibuya, Tokyo 150-0001日本
description_en: Famous tonkatsu in a converted bathhouse; the pork is so tender you can cut it with chopsticks.

name_jp: とんき 目黒本店
description_zh: 1939 年创业，开放式厨房表演式炸制，肉汁丰沛
address: 1-chōme-1-2 Shimomeguro, Meguro City, Tokyo 153-0064日本
description_en: Since 1939; watch the theatrical frying at the open kitchen — juicy and satisfying.

name_jp: 総本家 更科堀井
description_zh: 200 年历史的白色更科荞麦面元祖，口感清雅
address: 3-chōme-11-4 Motoazabu, Minato City, Tokyo 106-0046日本
description_en: The 200-year-old originator of white Sarashina soba — delicate and elegant.

name_jp: つるとんたん UDON NOODLE Brasserie 六本木店
name_zh: 鹤屯丹乌冬 六本木店
description_zh: 面碗超大的乌冬专门店，咖喱乌冬、明太子奶油乌冬为招牌
address: 日本〒106-0032 Tokyo, Minato City, Roppongi, 7-chōme−8−６ アクソール六本木 7F
description_en: An udon specialist famous for giant bowls; curry udon and mentaiko-cream udon are the signatures.

name_jp: 焼肉ジャンボ 白金本店
name_zh: 烧肉 Jumbo 白金本店
description_zh: 顶级和牛烧肉，每月特选 A5 黑毛和牛，需提前 1 个月预约
address: 日本〒108-0072 Tokyo, Minato City, Shirokane, 3-chōme−1−１ 第一麻布ビル 1F
description_en: Top-tier wagyu yakiniku with monthly A5 black-wagyu selections; book a month ahead.

name_jp: 日本料理 龍吟
description_zh: 米其林三星，主厨山本征治融合分子料理的现代怀石，鸟瞰东京夜景
address: 日本〒100-0006 Tokyo, Chiyoda City, Yūrakuchō, 1-chōme−1−２ 東京ミッドタウン日比谷 7階
description_en: Three Michelin stars; chef Seiji Yamamoto's modern kaiseki blends molecular technique, with sweeping Tokyo night views.

name_jp: 築地銀だこ 渋谷センター街店
name_zh: 筑地银だこ 涩谷中央街店
description_zh: 国民级章鱼烧连锁，外脆内嫩，逛街顺路解馋首选
address: 2-chōme-22-13 Shibuya, Tokyo 150-0002日本
description_en: Japan's national takoyaki chain — crisp outside, molten inside; the perfect snack while shopping.

name_jp: 野田岩 麻布飯倉本店
name_zh: 野田岩 麻布饭仓本店
description_zh: 1800 年代创业的鳗鱼名店，江户前关东风蒸烤工艺，鳗鱼饭分级清晰
address: 1-chōme-5-4 Higashiazabu, Minato City, Tokyo 106-0044日本
description_en: An eel institution since the 1800s using Kanto steam-then-grill technique, with clearly tiered unagi sets.

name_jp: カレーハウス CoCo壱番屋 秋葉原店
name_zh: CoCo 壱番屋咖喱 秋叶原店
description_zh: 日式咖喱国民连锁，辣度/配料/饭量全可定制，深夜也开
address: 日本〒101-0027 Tokyo, Chiyoda City, Kanda Hirakawachō, ４ 渡辺ビル １階
description_en: Japan's national curry chain; spice level, toppings and rice portion all customizable, open late.

name_jp: 浅草今半 国際通り本店
name_zh: 浅草今半 国际通本店
description_zh: 1895 年创业的寿喜烧/涮锅老铺，黑毛和牛专用，氛围典雅
address: 3-chōme-1-12 Nishiasakusa, Taito City, Tokyo 111-0035日本
description_en: A sukiyaki and shabu-shabu institution since 1895, using black wagyu in an elegant setting.

name_jp: 銀座 久兵衛 本店
name_zh: 银座 久兵卫 本店
description_zh: 1935年创业的银座寿司名门，昭和天皇御用达，经典江户前技法传承至今
address: 8-chōme-7-6 Ginza, Chuo City, Tokyo 104-0061日本
description_en: A prestigious Ginza sushi house since 1935, once served the Showa Emperor, carrying on classic Edomae craft.

name_jp: スシロー 秋葉原店
description_zh: 日本最大连锁回转寿司，食材新鲜平价，全程触控屏点单无语言障碍
address: 日本〒101-0021 Tokyo, Chiyoda City, Sotokanda, 3-chōme−15−１ アキバプレイスビル 8階
description_en: Japan's largest conveyor-belt sushi chain — fresh, affordable, with touch-screen ordering and no language barrier.

name_jp: つじ半 日本橋本店
name_zh: つじ半 日本桥本店
description_zh: 东京最排队的海鲜丼之一，可选鲜鱼刺身版或汤泡饭版，午市常排 1 小时
address: 日本〒103-0027 Tokyo, Chuo City, Nihonbashi, 3-chōme−1−１５ 久栄ビル １Ｆ
description_en: One of Tokyo's most queued seafood bowls; choose sashimi-style or dashi-poured — lunch waits often hit an hour.

name_jp: 魚べい 渋谷道玄坂店
name_zh: 鱼美 涩谷道玄坂店
description_zh: 新干线式超高速寿司传送带，平板点单直接送到面前，网红体验打卡必去
address: 日本〒150-0043 Tokyo, Shibuya, Dōgenzaka, 2-chōme−29−１１ Central Bldg. 6, １階
description_en: Shinkansen-style high-speed sushi delivery; order on a tablet and it zooms to your seat — a fun must-try.

name_jp: 六厘舎 東京駅店
description_zh: 东京站地下浓厚系蘸面代表，鱼介豚骨汤底超浓郁，面条粗且有嚼劲
address: 日本〒100-0005 Tokyo, Chiyoda City, Marunouchi, 1-chōme−9−１ 東京駅一番街 B1F 東京拉麵街 内
description_en: Tokyo Station's flagship rich tsukemen; an intense seafood-tonkotsu broth with thick, chewy noodles.

name_jp: 風雲児
description_zh: 新宿西口蘸面名店，鸡白汤 × 鱼介双重汤底，整理券制不需要久等
address: 日本〒151-0053 Tokyo, Shibuya, Yoyogi, 2-chōme−14−３ 北斗第一ビル １F
description_en: A famed Shinjuku-west tsukemen shop with chicken-paitan × seafood double broth; the ticket system keeps waits short.

name_jp: AFURI 六本木店
description_zh: 柚子盐清汤拉面，清爽不油腻，设计感强，海外也有分店，外国游客高度推荐
address: 日本〒106-0032 Tokyo, Minato City, Roppongi, 4-chōme−9−４ ＵＦビル ４ 1F
description_en: Yuzu-shio clear-broth ramen — light and refreshing; stylish, with overseas branches and high marks from visitors.

name_jp: 蒙古タンメン中本 池袋店
name_zh: 蒙古担担面 中本 池袋店
description_zh: 辣度挑战系拉面，蒙古担担面是招牌，辣度从 0 到 9 可选，嗜辣必试
address: 日本〒170-0013 Tokyo, Toshima City, Higashiikebukuro, 1-chōme−12−１５ 近代2ビル 1F
description_en: Spice-challenge ramen; the signature Mongolian tanmen lets you pick heat from 0 to 9 — a must for chili lovers.

name_jp: 天一 銀座本店
description_zh: 1930年创业天妇罗老铺，芝麻油炸制，虾天妇罗与饭套装是经典选择
address: 6-chōme-6-5 Ginza, Chuo City, Tokyo 104-0061日本
description_en: A tempura institution since 1930, fried in sesame oil; the shrimp tempura set is the classic pick.

name_jp: 天丼てんや 浅草店
description_zh: 平价天妇罗丼连锁，约 600 円即可吃到虾+蔬菜天妇罗套餐，旅游省钱之选
address: 1-chōme-9-2 Asakusa, Taito City, Tokyo 111-0032日本
description_en: A budget tempura-bowl chain; a shrimp-and-vegetable tendon set for around ¥600 — easy on the travel wallet.

name_jp: 権八 西麻布本店
description_zh: 电影《杀死比尔》取景地原型，古民家改建居酒屋，串烧与荞麦面同样出色
address: 1-chōme-13-11 Nishiazabu, Minato City, Tokyo 106-0031日本
description_en: The izakaya that inspired the 'Kill Bill' set; a converted folk house where skewers and soba both shine.

name_jp: 串カツ田中 渋谷道玄坂店
name_zh: 串炸田中 涩谷道玄坂店
description_zh: 大阪串炸东京连锁，猪肉/蔬菜/海鲜各类串炸，酱汁不能二次蘸是规矩
address: 2-chōme-18-7 Dōgenzaka, Shibuya, Tokyo 150-0043日本
description_en: An Osaka kushikatsu chain in Tokyo; pork, vegetable and seafood skewers — and remember, no double-dipping the sauce.

name_jp: 磯丸水産 新宿東口店
name_zh: 磯丸水产 新宿东口店
description_zh: 24小时海鲜居酒屋，帆立贝、牡蛎等可在桌边自己烤，深夜也热闹
address: 日本〒160-0022 Tokyo, Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 3-chōme−17−１３ 雀のおじさんビル 1-4F
description_en: A 24-hour seafood izakaya where you grill scallops and oysters at your table — lively even late at night.

name_jp: かつくら 新宿髙島屋店
name_zh: 胜藏 新宿高岛屋店
description_zh: 京都起家的精品炸猪排，芝麻自己研磨是仪式感，猪排外酥内嫩多汁
address: 日本〒151-0051 Tokyo, Shibuya, Sendagaya, 5-chōme−24−２ Times Square Building, 14F 高島屋
description_en: A refined Kyoto-born tonkatsu shop; grinding your own sesame is part of the ritual, the cutlet crisp and juicy.

name_jp: とんかつ 和幸 東京駅グランスタ店
name_zh: 炸猪排 和幸 东京站 Gransta 店
description_zh: 东京站内便捷炸猪排，白饭/味噌汤/卷心菜无限续，性价比超高的车站用餐
address: 日本〒104-0028 Tokyo, Chuo City, Yaesu, 2-chōme−1 八重洲地下街 B1
description_en: Convenient tonkatsu inside Tokyo Station with free refills of rice, miso soup and cabbage — great-value station dining.

name_jp: 丸亀製麺 渋谷店
description_zh: 现场手工制作讃岐乌冬，约 500 円一碗，天妇罗单点自选，日本国民级午餐
address: 日本〒150-0002 Tokyo, Shibuya, 1-chōme−16−１４ 渋谷地下鉄ビルディング 1F
description_en: Sanuki udon made fresh on-site for around ¥500 a bowl, with self-serve tempura — a national lunch staple.

name_jp: 砂場 赤坂店
description_zh: 江户三大荞麦发祥地之一，冷盛荞麦搭配本葛粉蘸汁，清雅古典
address: 6-chōme-3-5 Akasaka, Minato City, Tokyo 107-0052日本
description_en: One of the birthplaces of Edo's great soba lineages — chilled soba with kuzu-based dipping sauce, classic and refined.

name_jp: 叙々苑 新宿サザンテラス店
description_zh: 高端和牛烧肉连锁，泡菜与沙拉吧随意取，适合庆祝纪念日用餐
address: 日本〒160-0022 Tokyo, Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 3-chōme−27−１０ Musashino Building, 7F
description_en: An upscale wagyu yakiniku chain with a help-yourself kimchi and salad bar — good for celebrations.

name_jp: 牛角 渋谷道玄坂店
name_zh: 牛角 涩谷道玄坂店
description_zh: 日本最大烧肉连锁，无烟烤网+多样套餐，初次体验烧肉的友好入门之选
address: 日本〒150-0043 Tokyo, Shibuya, Dōgenzaka, 2-chōme−28−５ 秀永 ビル Ｂ1Ｆ
description_en: Japan's largest yakiniku chain with smokeless grills and varied sets — a friendly intro to grilling your own meat.

name_jp: 焼肉ライク 新宿西口店
name_zh: 烧肉 Like 新宿西口店
description_zh: 单人烧肉专门店，独立排烟罩，约 1000 円可吃到牛肉套餐，独旅必去
address: 日本〒160-0023 Tokyo, Shinjuku City, Nishishinjuku, 7-chōme−11−１７ ブレステン西新宿 1F
description_en: A solo-yakiniku specialist with personal smoke hoods; a beef set for around ¥1,000 — ideal for solo travelers.

name_jp: 神田 南青山
description_zh: 米其林三星，主厨神田裕行的季节性怀石，食材极致鲜活，日本料理界天花板之一
address: 日本〒107-0062 Tokyo, Minato City, Minamiaoyama, 3-chōme−2−６ セントラル第5青山ビルBF
description_en: Three Michelin stars; chef Hiroyuki Kanda's seasonal kaiseki uses peak-fresh ingredients — a pinnacle of Japanese cuisine.

name_jp: 虎白 神楽坂
description_zh: 米其林三星，神楽坂石板路上的现代怀石，以出汁技术闻名，极致的鲜味哲学
address: 3-chōme-５-5 Kagurazaka, Shinjuku City, Tokyo 162-0825日本
description_en: Three Michelin stars on a Kagurazaka cobblestone lane; modern kaiseki renowned for its dashi mastery and umami philosophy.

name_jp: 染太郎 浅草
description_zh: 昭和老建筑内的大阪烧老铺，自己动手在铁板上烤，氛围复古迷人
address: 2-chōme-2-2 Nishiasakusa, Taito City, Tokyo 111-0035日本
description_en: An okonomiyaki shop in a charming Showa-era building; cook it yourself on the griddle for a retro experience.

name_jp: しゃぶしゃぶ温野菜 新宿東口店
name_zh: 涮涮锅 温野菜 新宿东口店
description_zh: 多汤底涮涮锅连锁，蔬菜无限供应，猪肉/牛肉套餐选择多，干净宽敞
address: 日本〒160-0022 Tokyo, Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 3-chōme−36−１５ 新宿内野ビル 3Ｆ
description_en: A multi-broth shabu-shabu chain with unlimited vegetables and many pork/beef sets, clean and spacious.

name_jp: しゃぶ葉 池袋東口店
name_zh: 涮涮叶 池袋东口店
description_zh: 涮涮锅吃到饱，汤底/涮料/甜点均可无限，约 2000 円满足感极高
address: 日本〒170-0013 Tokyo, Toshima City, Higashiikebukuro, 1-chōme−29−１ サントロペ池袋ビル ６階
description_en: All-you-can-eat shabu-shabu — unlimited broths, ingredients and dessert for around ¥2,000.

name_jp: 前川 浅草
description_zh: 隅田川畔的鳗鱼老铺，关东蒸烤工艺，鳗鱼饭分量扎实，窗外景色极佳
address: 日本〒111-0043 Tokyo, Taito City, Komagata, 2-chōme−1−２９ 浅草 うなぎ 鰻 個室
description_en: A long-established eel house on the Sumida River; Kanto steam-grill technique, generous portions and lovely river views.

name_jp: 吉野家 渋谷店
description_zh: 日本牛丼国民品牌，约 500 円即可吃到经典牛肉盖饭，深夜也营业
address: 2-chōme-25-12 Dōgenzaka, Shibuya, Tokyo 150-0043日本
description_en: Japan's national gyudon brand; the classic beef bowl for around ¥500, open late.

name_jp: なか卯 渋谷道玄坂店
name_zh: なか卯 涩谷道玄坂店
description_zh: 亲子丼与和风牛丼专门连锁，出汁鲜甜，比吉野家更和风细腻
address: 37-13 Udagawachō, Shibuya, Tokyo 150-0042日本
description_en: A chain specializing in oyakodon and Japanese-style gyudon — a sweeter dashi, more delicate than Yoshinoya.

name_jp: 大戸屋 新宿西口店
name_zh: 大户屋 新宿西口店
description_zh: 日式家庭料理连锁，烤鱼定食/鸡肉丼/蔬菜套餐均衡健康，适合不想踩雷的日常餐
address: 日本〒160-0023 Tokyo, Shinjuku City, Nishishinjuku, 1-chōme−3−１ 新宿サン・フラワービル 3F
description_en: A Japanese home-style chain with grilled-fish sets, chicken bowls and balanced, healthy meals — a reliable everyday choice.

name_jp: 伊豆栄 上野本店
description_zh: 300年历史上野鳗鱼名门，关东蒸烤鳗鱼饭，紧邻上野公园，赏花必访
address: 2-chōme-12-22 Ueno, Taito City, Tokyo 110-0005日本
description_en: A 300-year-old Ueno eel house; Kanto-style grilled unagi right by Ueno Park — a cherry-blossom-season favorite.

name_jp: 上野藪そば
description_zh: 江户薮系荞麦面老铺，鸭汁荞麦面为招牌，老东京风情满满
address: 6-chōme-9-16 Ueno, 台東区 Taito City, Tokyo 110-0005日本
description_en: A veteran Edo Yabu-lineage soba shop; the duck-broth soba is the signature, full of old-Tokyo character.

name_jp: 上野精養軒
description_zh: 1872年创业西餐老铺，牛肉炖汤是日本洋食起源之一，上野公园内
address: 4-58 Uenokōen, Taito City, Tokyo 110-8715日本
description_en: A Western-cuisine institution since 1872 inside Ueno Park; its beef stew is part of Japan's yoshoku origins.

name_jp: 鳥ぎん 上野店
description_zh: 备长炭烧鸟，鸡皮与软骨为招牌，昭和老铺热闹氛围
address: 日本〒110-0005 Tokyo, Taito City, Ueno, 4-chōme−9−１５ オサダビル
description_en: Binchotan-grilled yakitori; chicken skin and cartilage are the standouts in a lively Showa-era shop.

name_jp: 蒙古タンメン中本 上野店
name_zh: 蒙古担担面 中本 上野店
description_zh: 辣度挑战系拉面，上野店人气高，辣味蒙古担担面饱腹又刺激
address: 日本〒110-0005 Tokyo, Taito City, Ueno, 5-chōme−10−１４ ラーメン横丁内
description_en: Spice-challenge ramen; this popular Ueno branch's fiery Mongolian tanmen is both filling and thrilling.

name_jp: とんかつ 伊佐吉 上野
name_zh: 炸猪排 伊佐吉 上野
description_zh: 上野周边口碑炸猪排，份量扎实性价比高，午市多人排队
address: 4-chōme-5-1 Ueno, Taito City, Tokyo 110-0005日本
description_en: A well-loved tonkatsu near Ueno; hearty portions and great value, with lunchtime queues.

name_jp: 牛たん炭焼 利久 上野店
name_zh: 烤牛舌 利久 上野店
description_zh: 仙台名物牛舌专门店，厚切盐烤牛舌配麦饭和牛尾汤，日本专有体验
address: 日本〒110-0005 Tokyo, Taito City, Ueno, 3-chōme−24−６ PARCO_ya上野6F
description_en: A specialist in Sendai's famous beef tongue; thick-cut salt-grilled gyutan with barley rice and oxtail soup.

name_jp: 天丼てんや 上野店
description_zh: 平价天妇罗丼连锁上野店，600円虾蔬天妇罗套餐，逛浅草/上野必吃
address: 5-chōme-27-1 Ueno, Taito City, Tokyo 110-0005日本
description_en: The Ueno branch of a budget tendon chain; a ¥600 shrimp-and-vegetable set, handy while exploring Ueno and Asakusa.

name_jp: 鍋ぞう 上野店
description_zh: 多汤底吃到饱火锅，中文菜单，价位亲民，全家游必去
address: 3-chōme-24-6 Ueno, Taito City, Tokyo 110-0005日本
description_en: All-you-can-eat hot pot with multiple broths, a Chinese menu and friendly prices — great for families.

name_jp: くら寿司 上野店
description_zh: 平价回转寿司连锁，触控点单防护盖设计，家庭出行首选
address: 日本〒110-0016 Tokyo, Taito City, Taitō, 4-chōme−33−１ クロスポイント御徒町 2F
description_en: A budget conveyor-sushi chain with touch ordering and hygienic covered plates — a family favorite.

name_jp: お好み焼き ゆかり 上野店
name_zh: 大阪烧 雪花 上野店
description_zh: 大阪本场大阪烧连锁东京分店，薄皮脆底，豚玉是招牌
address: 日本〒101-0021 Tokyo, Chiyoda City, Sotokanda, 4-chōme−14−１ 秋葉原ＵＤＸ ＡＫＩＢＡ－ＩＣＨＩ３階
description_en: The Tokyo branch of an authentic Osaka okonomiyaki chain; thin and crisp, with pork-and-egg as the signature.

name_jp: 吉野家 上野店
description_zh: 上野必经的24小时牛丼，深夜逛完博物馆或夜市的最佳收尾
address: Ueno Building, 7-chōme-3-2 Ueno, Taito City, Tokyo 110-0005日本
description_en: A 24-hour gyudon spot in Ueno — the perfect late-night finish after museums or the night market.

name_jp: 神田 まつや
description_zh: 1884年创业东京荞麦名店，昭和文豪常客，冷荞麦蘸汁层次极深
address: 1-chōme-13 Kanda Sudachō, Chiyoda City, Tokyo 101-0041日本
description_en: A famed Tokyo soba shop since 1884, once frequented by Showa-era writers; its chilled soba dipping sauce is deeply layered.

name_jp: 神田 やぶそば
description_zh: 江户三大薮蕎麦之首，1880年创业，细切绿色荞麦面清香独特
address: 日本〒101-0063 東京都千代田区神田淡路町２丁目１０
description_en: The foremost of Edo's three great Yabu soba houses, founded 1880; its fine green soba has a distinctive fragrance.

name_jp: 吉野家 秋葉原店
description_zh: 秋叶原逛街途中的快速牛丼，深夜血拼后的最佳补给
address: 1-chōme-11-8 Sotokanda, Chiyoda City, Tokyo 101-0021日本
description_en: A quick gyudon stop while exploring Akihabara — the best refuel after a late shopping spree.

name_jp: 斑鳩 秋葉原店
description_zh: 鱼介系酱油浓汤拉面，汤底鲜味层次丰富，秋叶原逛街必填肚子
address: 日本〒100-0005 Tokyo, Chiyoda City, Marunouchi, 1-chōme−9−１ 東京駅一番街 B1 東京ラーメンストリート
description_en: Seafood-shoyu rich-broth ramen with deeply layered umami — a great fill-up while in Akihabara.

name_jp: やきとり大統領 秋葉原店
name_zh: 烧鸟大总统 秋叶原店
description_zh: 平价烧鸟居酒屋，烧鸟单串约100円起，闲逛秋叶原后的聚餐好去处
address: 日本〒101-0025 Tokyo, Chiyoda City, Kanda Sakumachō, 2-chōme−１１ 秋葉原KSCビル 2F JD
description_en: A budget yakitori izakaya with skewers from around ¥100 — a good group spot after wandering Akihabara.

name_jp: 浅草 三定
description_zh: 1837年创业浅草天妇罗老铺，江户前炸法酥脆清爽，就在仲见世通旁
address: 1-chōme-2-2 Asakusa, Taito City, Tokyo 111-0032日本

name_jp: 大黒家天麩羅 浅草本店
name_zh: 大黑家天妇罗 浅草本店
description_zh: 浅草最有名天妇罗老铺之一，浓黑芝麻酱油汤底天丼是特色，排队也值得
address: 1-chōme-38-10 Asakusa, Taito City, Tokyo 111-0032日本
description_en: One of Asakusa's most famous tempura houses; the dark sesame-shoyu tendon is the specialty — worth the queue.

name_jp: 駒形どぜう
description_zh: 1801年创业的泥鳅火锅元祖，江户料理文化活化石，稀缺体验
address: 1-chōme-7-12 Komagata, Taito City, Tokyo 111-0043日本
description_en: The 1801-founded originator of loach hot pot — a living relic of Edo food culture and a rare experience.

name_jp: 川千家 浅草
description_zh: 浅草老牌鳗鱼饭，关东秘传蒸烤，鳗鱼饭配上腌菜和清汤一套完整
address: 7-chōme-6-16 Shibamata, Katsushika City, Tokyo 125-0052日本
description_en: A long-running Asakusa unagi shop; Kanto secret steam-grill technique, served as a full set with pickles and clear soup.

name_jp: 人形町今半 浅草店
name_zh: 人形町今半 浅草店
description_zh: 百年和牛寿喜锅专门店，黑毛和牛寿喜烧配生蛋，正统关东风味
address: 1-chōme-19-7 Asakusa, Taito City, Tokyo 111-0032日本
description_en: A century-old wagyu sukiyaki specialist; black-wagyu sukiyaki with raw egg in authentic Kanto style.

name_jp: ちゃんこ 巴潟 両国本店
name_zh: 相扑火锅 巴潟 两国本店
description_zh: 两国相扑部屋直传的力士火锅，鸡汤底蔬菜豆腐滋味绝佳，分量超大
address: 2-chōme-17-6 Ryōgoku, Sumida City, Tokyo 130-0026日本
description_en: Sumo-stable chanko hot pot in Ryogoku; a superb chicken broth with vegetables and tofu in huge portions.

name_jp: すしざんまい 池袋東口店
name_zh: 寿司三昧 池袋东口店
description_zh: 24小时营业的寿司连锁，深夜也能吃到新鲜金枪鱼，价格合理
address: 日本〒171-0022 Tokyo, Toshima City, Minamiikebukuro, 1-chōme−27−８ 大庄池袋 東口ビル

name_jp: とんかつ 八千代 池袋
name_zh: 炸猪排 八千代 池袋
description_zh: 池袋老派炸猪排，里脊猪排外酥内嫩，味噌汤免费续杯
address: 日本〒171-0022 Tokyo, Toshima City, Minamiikebukuro, 2-chōme−47−７ 1F
description_en: An old-school Ikebukuro tonkatsu; a crisp-outside, tender-inside loin cutlet with free miso-soup refills.

name_jp: 牛角 池袋東口店
description_zh: 池袋热闹烧肉连锁，无烟烤网多人聚餐首选，午市套餐超值
address: 日本〒170-0013 Tokyo, Toshima City, Higashiikebukuro, 1-chōme−21−１３ ＯＲＥ池袋 6Ｆ
description_en: A lively Ikebukuro yakiniku chain with smokeless grills — a go-to for group meals, with great-value lunch sets.

name_jp: くら寿司 池袋東口店
name_zh: 藏寿司 池袋东口店
description_zh: 平价回转寿司，防护盖设计保鲜，触控点单零语言压力
address: 日本〒171-0022 Tokyo, Toshima City, Minamiikebukuro, 1-chōme−19−５ Ｇビル 01 Ｂ1Ｆ
description_en: Budget conveyor sushi with hygienic covered plates and touch ordering — zero language stress.

name_jp: ラーメン元祖 池袋総本店
name_zh: 拉面元祖 池袋总本店
description_zh: 池袋老牌酱油拉面，汤底清澈鲜味突出，深受本地上班族喜爱
address: 3-chōme-33-17 Nishiikebukuro, Toshima City, Tokyo 171-0021日本
description_en: A veteran Ikebukuro shoyu ramen; a clear broth with pronounced umami, beloved by local office workers.

name_jp: 丸亀製麺 池袋東口店
name_zh: 丸龟制面 池袋东口店
description_zh: 现场制作讃岐乌冬，天妇罗可单点，500円以内吃饱
address: 日本〒170-0013 Tokyo, Toshima City, Higashiikebukuro, 3-chōme−1−３ サンシャインシティアルタ B1F
description_en: Sanuki udon made on-site with à la carte tempura — a filling meal for under ¥500.

name_jp: 天丼てんや 池袋東口店
name_zh: 天丼天屋 池袋东口店
description_zh: 平价天妇罗丼，600円大虾蔬菜天丼，快速饱腹
address: 日本〒171-0022 Tokyo, Toshima City, Minamiikebukuro, 1-chōme−19−３ 池袋嘉泉ビル
description_en: Budget tendon; a ¥600 shrimp-and-vegetable bowl for a quick, filling meal.

name_jp: AFURI 原宿店
description_zh: 柚子盐拉面发源店，原宿竹下通周边，逛街购物后清爽一碗
address: 日本〒151-0051 Tokyo, Shibuya, Sendagaya, 3-chōme−63−１ グランデフォレスタ原宿 1F
description_en: A home of yuzu-shio ramen near Harajuku's Takeshita Street — a refreshing bowl after shopping.

name_jp: 鳥良商店 表参道店
name_zh: 鸟良商店 表参道店
description_zh: 备长炭烧鸟，鸡肉质量上乘，表参道逛完顺路的优质居酒屋

name_jp: すき家 原宿店
description_zh: 日本最大牛丼连锁，原宿购物疲惫时的快速补给，多种配料可选
address: 3-chōme-23-3 Jingūmae, Shibuya, Tokyo 150-0001日本

name_jp: 蕎麦 穂村 表参道
name_zh: 荞麦 穗村 表参道
description_zh: 表参道隐秘荞麦名店，石臼现磨荞麦粉，午间套餐高性价比
address: 5-chōme-23-3 Jingūmae, Shibuya, Tokyo 150-0001日本

name_jp: とんかつ 和幸 表参道店
name_zh: 炸猪排 和幸 表参道店
description_zh: 表参道商业区炸猪排，白饭/卷心菜/味噌汤无限续，逛街正餐好选择

name_jp: 回転寿司 花まる 表参道店
name_zh: 回转寿司 花丸 表参道店
description_zh: 北海道直送食材的回转寿司，毛蟹/海胆/鮭鱼卵水准高，排队值得

name_jp: 一蘭 新宿店
description_zh: 新宿店隔间式天然豚骨拉面，深夜也营业，歌舞伎町夜游后的宵夜

name_jp: 回転寿司 根室花まる キッテグランシェ店
name_zh: 回转寿司 根室花丸 KITTE店
description_zh: 东京站内北海道直送回转寿司，毛蟹、海胆、牡丹虾水准远超东京均值

name_jp: 欧風カレー ボンディ 新宿店
name_zh: 欧式咖喱 Bondy 新宿店

name_jp: 肉の万世 新宿店
description_zh: 精肉店直营炸猪排/牛排，肉质直接来自精肉卖场，鲜度有保证
address: 1-chōme-1-2 Nishishinjuku, Shinjuku City, Tokyo 160-0023日本
description_en: Tonkatsu and steak run by a butcher; the meat comes straight from the shop's own counter, freshness guaranteed.

name_jp: くら寿司 新宿店
description_zh: 新宿平价回转寿司，触控点单，家庭游客首选，质优价廉
address: 日本〒160-0023 Tokyo, Shinjuku City, Nishishinjuku, 7-chōme−1−７ 新宿ダイカンプラザA館 2F
description_en: Budget conveyor sushi in Shinjuku with touch ordering — a top pick for visiting families, good quality at low prices.

name_jp: 新宿 思い出横丁 いづみや
name_zh: 新宿 回忆横丁 泉屋
description_zh: 新宿西口昭和烟火气小巷，排排坐烧鸟摊，配生啤感受真实东京夜生活
address: 1 Chome-2 Nishishinjuku, Shinjuku City, Tokyo 160-0023日本
description_en: A Showa-era alley off Shinjuku's west exit; line up at the yakitori stalls with a draft beer for real Tokyo nightlife.

name_jp: 麺屋 武蔵 新宿本店
name_zh: 面屋 武藏 新宿本店
description_zh: 浓厚系鱼介豚骨拉面大师店，麻辣/甜味双汤底特色，排队常见
address: 日本〒160-0023 Tokyo, Shinjuku City, Nishishinjuku, 7-chōme−2−６ 西新宿Ｋ－１ビル 1F
description_en: A master shop for rich seafood-tonkotsu ramen; known for spicy and sweet double broths — queues are common.

name_jp: 鍋ぞう 新宿東口店
description_zh: 新宿吃到饱火锅，多汤底+多涮料无限量，有中文菜单
address: 日本〒160-0022 Tokyo, Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 3-chōme−28−１０ ヒューマックスパビリオン新宿東口 3F・4F
description_en: All-you-can-eat hot pot in Shinjuku — unlimited broths and ingredients, with a Chinese menu.

name_jp: うなぎ 野田岩 新宿店
name_zh: 野田岩鳗鱼 新宿店
description_zh: 百年老铺野田岩新宿分店，关东蒸烤鳗鱼，新宿便利好找
address: 1-chōme-5-4 Higashiazabu, Minato City, Tokyo 106-0044日本
description_en: The Shinjuku branch of century-old Nodaiwa; Kanto steam-grilled eel, conveniently easy to find.

name_jp: 鶴橋風月 新宿店
description_zh: 大阪人气大阪烧连锁，可自己在铁板动手烤，海鲜/猪肉各种配料
address: 日本〒160-0022 Tokyo, Shinjuku City, Shinjuku, 3-chōme−14−２３ マヤビル B1F
description_en: A popular Osaka okonomiyaki chain; cook it yourself on the griddle with seafood, pork and more.

name_jp: くら寿司 渋谷店
description_zh: 涩谷平价回转寿司，触控点单，购物疲惫后快速解决正餐
address: 日本〒150-0042 Tokyo, Shibuya, Udagawachō, 23−３ 渋谷第一勧銀共同ビル 7F
description_en: Budget conveyor sushi in Shibuya with touch ordering — a quick proper meal after a shopping spree.

name_jp: すき家 渋谷道玄坂店
name_zh: 食其家 涩谷道玄坂店
description_zh: 日本最大牛丼连锁，咖喱/牛丼/猪丼等多选，深夜也开
address: 2-chōme-29-29番11号 Dōgenzaka, Shibuya, Tokyo 150-0043日本
description_en: Japan's largest gyudon chain with curry, beef and pork bowls — open late.

name_jp: 博多天神 渋谷店
description_zh: 正宗博多细面豚骨，细面替玉（加面）无料，极浓白汤
address: 日本〒150-0043 Tokyo, Shibuya, Dōgenzaka, 1-chōme−5−４ Shoriki Bldg., １F
description_en: Authentic Hakata thin-noodle tonkotsu; free noodle refills and an intensely rich white broth.

name_jp: かつや 渋谷店
description_zh: 平价炸猪排丼连锁，约600円吃到炸猪排盖饭，快速饱腹
address: 日本〒150-0043 Tokyo, Shibuya, Dōgenzaka, 2-chōme−9−２ 正実ビル 1F
description_en: A budget katsudon chain; a pork-cutlet rice bowl for around ¥600 — quick and filling.

name_jp: 鶴橋風月 渋谷店
description_zh: 涩谷大阪烧名店，豚玉/海鲜/混合多种口味，铁板自烤乐趣多
address: 日本〒101-0028 Tokyo, Chiyoda City, Kanda Hanaokachō, １−１ ヨドバシＡｋｉｂａビル ８階
description_en: A well-known Shibuya okonomiyaki shop; pork, seafood and mixed flavors, with the fun of griddling it yourself.

name_jp: 焼肉ライク 渋谷店
description_zh: 单人烧肉专门店，独旅首选，独立排烟罩，约1000円牛肉套餐
address: 日本〒150-0043 Tokyo, Shibuya, Dōgenzaka, 2-chōme−16−３ Takabaya Bldg., １階
description_en: A solo-yakiniku specialist with personal smoke hoods; a beef set for around ¥1,000 — ideal for solo travelers.

name_jp: 柚子家 渋谷店
name_zh: 柚子家火锅 涩谷店
description_zh: 柚子风味涮涮锅，清爽不油腻，适合多人聚餐
address: 日本〒150-0043 Tokyo, Shibuya, Dōgenzaka, 1-chōme−3−１１ Ichiban Bldg., B1
description_en: Yuzu-scented shabu-shabu — light, not greasy, great for group dining.

name_jp: 鮨 よしたけ 銀座
description_zh: 米其林三星，吉武正博主厨精湛江户前寿司，醋饭与鱼料搭配达到完美平衡
address: 日本〒104-0061 Tokyo, Chuo City, Ginza, 7-chōme−8−１３ Brown Place９Ｆ
description_en: Three Michelin stars; chef Masahiro Yoshitake's exquisite Edomae sushi strikes a perfect rice-and-fish balance.

name_jp: 銀座 小十
description_zh: 米其林二星怀石料理，奥田透主厨精细日本食材运用，餐器也是艺术品
address: 日本〒104-0061 Tokyo, Chuo City, Ginza, 5-chōme−4−８ 銀座カリオカビル 4F
description_en: Two-Michelin-star kaiseki; chef Toru Okuda's refined use of Japanese ingredients, with tableware that is art in itself.

name_jp: 銀座 天國
description_zh: 1885年创业银座天妇罗老铺，胡麻油炸制，虾天妇罗香气馥郁
address: 日本〒104-0061 Tokyo, Chuo City, Ginza, 8-chōme−11−３ 1F
description_en: A Ginza tempura institution since 1885, fried in sesame oil; the shrimp tempura is wonderfully fragrant.

name_jp: うな鐵 銀座店
description_zh: 银座鳗鱼饭新派代表，鳗鱼质量上乘，餐厅设计现代简洁
address: 日本〒104-0061 Tokyo, Chuo City, Ginza, 7-chōme−4−１４ 光ビル １F
description_en: A modern take on Ginza unagi; top-quality eel in a clean, contemporary dining space.

name_jp: 荻窪ラーメン 春木屋
description_zh: 东京酱油拉面发祥名店，1949年创业，动物系×鱼介系复合汤底，东京必吃
address: 1-chōme-4-6 Kamiogi, Suginami City, Tokyo 167-0043日本
description_en: A founding name of Tokyo shoyu ramen, established 1949; an animal × seafood blended broth — a Tokyo must-eat.

name_jp: 分とく山 西麻布
description_zh: 米其林三星，野崎洋光主厨的现代日本料理，六本木周边顶级怀石
address: 5-chōme-1-5 Minamiazabu, Minato City, Tokyo 106-0047日本
description_en: Three Michelin stars; chef Yoshimitsu Nozaki's modern Japanese cuisine — top-tier kaiseki near Roppongi.

name_jp: すき家 六本木店
description_zh: 六本木深夜不打烊牛丼，夜店散场后的深夜饱腹必选
address: 5-chōme-9-22 Roppongi, Minato City, Tokyo 106-0032日本
description_en: A round-the-clock gyudon in Roppongi — the go-to late-night fill-up after the clubs close.

name_jp: 一風堂 六本木店
description_zh: 白丸赤丸经典博多豚骨，六本木逛完美术馆后快速暖身
address: 日本〒106-0032 Tokyo, Minato City, Roppongi, 4-chōme−9−１１ 第2小田切ビル 1F
description_en: Classic Shiromaru and Akamaru Hakata tonkotsu — a quick warm-up after the Roppongi art museums.

name_jp: 叙々苑 六本木店
description_zh: 六本木高端和牛烧肉，适合商务宴请或庆祝特殊纪念日
address: 日本〒106-0032 Tokyo, Minato City, Roppongi, 7-chōme−14−４ レム六本木ビル 2F
description_en: Upscale wagyu yakiniku in Roppongi — well suited to business dinners or special celebrations.

name_jp: 牛たん炭焼 利久 東京駅店
name_zh: 烤牛舌 利久 东京站店
description_zh: 仙台牛舌名店东京站内分店，厚切盐烤牛舌+麦饭+牛尾汤，乘车前必吃
address: 日本〒100-0005 Tokyo, Chiyoda City, Marunouchi, 1-chōme−9−１ グランスタ八重洲B1
description_en: The Tokyo Station branch of a famed Sendai gyutan shop; thick salt-grilled beef tongue with barley rice and oxtail soup.

name_jp: すしざんまい 東京駅前店
name_zh: 寿司三昧 东京站前店
description_zh: 24小时营业的大众高性价比寿司，东京站附近乘车前后随时能吃
address: 4-chōme-11-9 Tsukiji, Chuo City, Tokyo 104-0045日本
description_en: A 24-hour, great-value popular sushi shop near Tokyo Station — handy any time around your train.

name_jp: 東京ラーメンストリート 斑鳩
description_zh: 东京站内拉面街代表店，鱼介系酱油拉面，搭乘前后超方便
address: 日本〒100-0005 Tokyo, Chiyoda City, Marunouchi, 1-chōme−9−１ 東京駅一番街 B1 東京ラーメンストリート
description_en: A flagship of Tokyo Station's Ramen Street; seafood-shoyu ramen, super convenient around your train.
